name_en: TEEN LULU Soft grainy calfskin bag
name_cn:
TEEN LULU Soft grainy calfskin bag
Top quality
Can be carried by hand, worn on the shoulder, or slung crossbody
This style fits larger smartphone models like PLUS
Calfskin
Suede lining
Gold hardware
1 main compartment
Adjustable top handle, 4.72 inches (12 cm) long
Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap, min length 20 inches (51 cm), max length 24 inches (60 cm)
Dimensions: 8.3 X 9.4 X 2 inches (21 X 24 X 5 cm)
Style No.: 120723
